summary_message: 3 prediction source recommendations generated. 3 odds source recommendations generated.

prediction_recommendations.source_name: Retrain local XGBoost/LightGBM on P32 gl2024 features
prediction_recommendations.url_or_reference: Re-use gl2024.txt processed artifacts at data/mlb_2024/processed/mlb_2024_game_identity_outcomes_joined.csv as training targets; retrain offline model with cross-validation to produce p_oof (out-of-fold) predictions.
prediction_recommendations.format_hint: CSV with columns: game_id, game_date, home_team, away_team, p_model, p_oof, fold_id, model_version
prediction_recommendations.license_note: Self-trained model on Retrosheet data. Must respect Retrosheet attribution requirement.
prediction_recommendations.blocker_if_skipped: P33_BLOCKED_NO_VERIFIED_PREDICTION_SOURCE will remain until p_model / p_oof columns are generated for 2024 games.

prediction_recommendations.source_name: FiveThirtyEight MLB ELO / Pitcher-adjusted win prob archive
prediction_recommendations.format_hint: CSV with columns: date, team1, team2, elo_prob1, pitcher1, pitcher2. Requires team name alias mapping to game_id.
prediction_recommendations.license_note: CC Attribution 4.0 International — attribution required. Check current availability; FTE data may require manual download.
prediction_recommendations.blocker_if_skipped: Prediction gap persists without alternative model source.

prediction_recommendations.url_or_reference: https://www.baseballprospectus.com/ — subscription required. Historic game-level win probabilities may be exportable.
prediction_recommendations.format_hint: CSV or Excel with game_id/date + win probability column.
prediction_recommendations.license_note: Commercial subscription. Verify redistribution rights before committing to repo.

odds_recommendations.source_name: Retrosheet has no odds — must use historical odds database
odds_recommendations.url_or_reference: https://www.sportsbookreviewsonline.com/scoresoddsarchives/mlb/ (free download, 2024 closing moneylines available in XLS format)
odds_recommendations.format_hint: XLS with columns: Date, Rot, VH, Team, 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, Final, Open, Close, ML. Requires manual parsing and game_id join.
odds_recommendations.license_note: Historical data — personal/research use. Do not redistribute raw file. Verify current terms before downloading.
odds_recommendations.blocker_if_skipped: P33_BLOCKED_NO_VERIFIED_ODDS_SOURCE will remain until closing moneylines are acquired and joined for 2024 games.

odds_recommendations.source_name: The Odds API — historical odds endpoint
odds_recommendations.url_or_reference: https://the-odds-api.com/liveapi/guides/v4/#get-historical-odds MLB historical endpoint; 2024 season data available. Requires paid API key.
odds_recommendations.format_hint: JSON with h2h markets: home_team, away_team, commence_time, bookmakers[].markets[].outcomes[].price
odds_recommendations.license_note: Commercial API. Key must be stored securely (not in repo). Check rate limits and redistribution rights.
odds_recommendations.blocker_if_skipped: Odds gap persists without alternative odds source.

odds_recommendations.url_or_reference: https://www.betmetrics.net/ or https://www.oddsportal.com/ (Pinnacle closing lines available via scraping or manual export)
odds_recommendations.format_hint: CSV with game_date, home, away, home_close_ml, away_close_ml.
odds_recommendations.license_note: Verify terms of service before automated scraping. Manual export for research use typically acceptable.
